entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.

entries.source: Separate documented fact from plausible reconstruction.
entries.value: Hlukanisa iqiniso elibhaliwe nokwakhiwa okungenzeka.

entries.source: Separate fact from invention
entries.value: Hlukanisa iqiniso nokusunguliwe

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Hlukanisa izimangalo zomlingiswa namanothi obufakazi.

entries.source: Separate known facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, and speculation. Do not fabricate direct quotes or fake sources. Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, or persecution. Keep in-world knowledge separate from historian knowledge.
entries.value: Hlukanisa amaqiniso aziwayo, ukwakhiwa okungenzeka, incazelo ephikisiwe, nokucatshangelwa. Ungaqambi izingcaphuno eziqondile noma imithombo yamanga. Ungenzi udlame, umbuso, ubukhoboka, isigaba, izifo, ukucindezelwa, noma ukuhlushwa kube yinto yothando. Gcina ulwazi lwangaphakathi emhlabeni luhlukene nolwazi lwesazi-mlando.

entries.source: SERVICE means the https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app website/inspir Mobile app operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession). USAGE DATA is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device). DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data. THE USER is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.
entries.value: I-SERVICE isho iwebhusayithi ethi https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app / uhlelo lweselula lwe-inspir oluqhutshwa yi-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). I-PERSONAL DATA isho idatha ngomuntu ophilayo ongahlonzwa kuleyo datha (noma kuleyo datha nolunye ulwazi esinalo noma okungenzeka siluthole). I-USAGE DATA yidatha eqoqwa ngokuzenzakalela, ekhiqizwa ukusetshenziswa kwe-Service noma ingqalasizinda ye-Service uqobo (isibonelo, ubude besikhathi sokuvakasha kwekhasi). Ama-COOKIES amafayela amancane agcinwa kudivayisi yakho (ikhompyutha noma idivayisi yeselula). I-DATA CONTROLLER isho umuntu wemvelo noma osemthethweni onquma (eyedwa noma ngokuhlanganyela nabanye) izinhloso nezindlela zokucubungula noma iyiphi idatha yomuntu siqu. Ngenhloso yale Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, singu-Data Controller wedatha yakho. I-DATA PROCESSORS (NOMA SERVICE PROVIDERS) isho noma yimuphi umuntu wemvelo noma osemthethweni ocubungula idatha egameni le-Data Controller. Singase sisebenzise izinsizakalo zama-Service Providers ahlukahlukene ukuze sicubungule idatha yakho ngempumelelo kakhudlwana. I-DATA SUBJECT yinoma yimuphi umuntu ophilayo ongumuntu okukhulunywa ngaye ku-Personal Data. I-USER ngumuntu osebenzisa i-Service yethu. I-User ihambisana ne-Data Subject, ongumuntu okukhulunywa ngaye ku-Personal Data.

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding
entries.value: Uthisha we-AI we-Socratic Wokuqonda Okujulile

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Uthisha we-AI we-Socratic Wokuqonda Okujulile uyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Guqula umqondo, impikiswano, inkinga, umbhalo, noma isinqumo kube uchungechunge lwemibuzo olugxilile. Umngane wakho ulalela impendulo ngayinye, amephu izizathu ezicatshangiwe nezikhala, futhi akuphushele esifinyezweni sakho sokugcina. Zama: "Ngisize ngiqonde izindleko zethuba."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring
entries.value: Ukufundisa okuqondiswa yi-Socratic

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Ukufundisa kwe-Socratic akusilo njalo impendulo. Uma umfundi engenaso isizinda nhlobo, incazelo emfushane ingaba nomusa kunombuzo. Uma esesimeni esiphuthumayo ngaphambi komnqamulajuqu, imodi yokuhlela efana ne-Exam Prep Planner noma imodi yezeluleko efana ne-Homework Coach ingaba ngcono. Uma inhloso ukukhumbula amagama, i-Flashcard Builder iqonde kakhudlwana.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Ukufundisa kwe-Socratic kusebenzisa imibuzo, imicabango yokuhlola, izeluleko, nokuzindla ukuze kwakhe ukuqonda okujulile kunokufunda impendulo ungenzi lutho.

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. Depending on where you transact with us and where your payment method was issued, your transaction with us may be subject to foreign exchange fees or differences in prices because of exchange rates.
entries.value: Ezinye izingxenye ze-Service zikhokhiswa ngesisekelo se-subscription (“Subscription(s)”). Umncintiswano ngamunye osingathwa enkundleni yethu uyisenzakalo esizimele futhi kudingeka ukhokhelwe ngesikhathi sokubhalisa. Uzokhokhiswa kusengaphambili ngendlela ephindaphindayo neyangesikhathi (“Billing Cycle”). Ama-Billing Cycles azosethwa kuye ngohlobo lohlelo lwe-subscription olukhethayo lapho uthenga i-Subscription. Ekupheleni kwe-Billing Cycle ngayinye, i-Subscription yakho izovuselelwa ngokuzenzakalela ngaphansi kwezimo ezifanayo ngaphandle uma uyikhansela noma i-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) iyikhansela. Ungakhansela ukuvuselelwa kwe-Subscription yakho ngekhasi lakho lokuphatha i-akhawunti ku-inthanethi noma ngokuxhumana nethimba lokweseka amakhasimende ku-support@inspir.app. Indlela yokukhokha evumelekile iyadingeka ukuze kucutshungulwe inkokhelo ye-subscription yakho. Kufanele unikeze i-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ulwazi lokukhokhisa olunembile noluphelele olungafaka kodwa lungagcini egameni eligcwele, ikheli, isifundazwe, ikhodi yeposi, inombolo yocingo, nolwazi lwendlela yokukhokha evumelekile. Ngokuthumela lolo lwazi lokukhokha, ugunyaza ngokuzenzakalela i-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ukuthi ikhokhise zonke izimali ze-Subscription ezenzeka nge-akhawunti yakho kunoma yiziphi lezo zinsimbi zokukhokha. Uma ukukhokhisa okuzenzakalelayo kwehluleka nganoma yisiphi isizathu, i-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) igcina ilungelo lokunqamula ukufinyelela kwakho ku-Service ngokushesha. Uma kukhona ukukhwabanisa, i-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ingakhansela i-subscription ngokushesha futhi isinqumo ngeke siphikiswe. Ezinsizakalweni ezikhokhelwayo, kufanele unikeze i-inspir umthombo wokukhokha ovumelekile ukuze ukhokhele lezo Zinsizakalo. Uyavuma futhi uyaqonda ukuthi umuntu omdala kuphela (oneminyaka engu-18 noma ngaphezulu) ongangena kunoma yikuphi ukuthengiselana noma i-subscription mayelana nalezo Zinsizakalo ezikhokhelwayo. Ezinye Izinsizakalo zingatholakala njengokuthenga okukodwa, kanti ezinye zingathengwa njenge-subscription yonyaka. Kuye ngokuthi uthengiselana nathi kuphi nokuthi indlela yakho yokukhokha ikhishwe kuphi, ukuthengiselana kwakho nathi kungase kube nezimali zokushintsha imali noma umehluko wamanani ngenxa yezilinganiso zokushintshisana.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Olunye usesho ludinga umtapo wezifundo. Olunye ludinga uthisha we-AI obukhoma, iseluleko, umbuzo we-Socratic, i-quiz, noma iqoqo lamakhadi okufunda. La makhasi enza lokho kukhetha kucace kakhudlwana.

entries.source: Start as soon as you know the exam date. If time is short, prioritize weak areas, past-paper style questions, and daily recall.
entries.value: Qala ngokushesha lapho wazi usuku lokuhlolwa. Uma isikhathi sisincane, beka phambili izindawo ezibuthaka, imibuzo yesitayela samaphepha adlule, nokukhumbula kwansuku zonke.

entries.source: Start by asking for a simple explanation, one everyday analogy, and the three ideas you need before the topic will make sense.
entries.value: Qala ngokucela incazelo elula, ukufanisa okukodwa kwansuku zonke, nemibono emithathu oyidingayo ngaphambi kokuba isihloko sizwakale.

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: Qala ngqo emodini yokufunda efanele yezeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, izinyathelo ze-math, ukugxeka ukubhala, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, noma ukuhlela izivivinyo.

entries.source: Start each session with a quick quiz before rereading.
entries.value: Qala iseshini ngayinye ngombuzo osheshayo ngaphambi kokuphinda ufunde.

entries.source: Start from a learning job, then move into practice.
entries.value: Qala ngomsebenzi wokufunda, bese uya ekuzijwayezeni.

entries.source: Start from a public learning mode with clear boundaries.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi yokufunda yomphakathi enemingcele ecacile.

entries.source: Start from first principles
entries.value: Qala emigomeni yokuqala

entries.source: Start from the exact kind of help you need.
entries.value: Qala ngohlobo losizo oludingayo ngqo.

entries.source: Start from the subject, then open the right learning mode.
entries.value: Qala ngesifundo, bese uvula imodi yokufunda efanele.

entries.source: Start from the thing you do not understand and get a plain-language model, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Qala entweni ongayiqondi bese uthola imodeli yolimi olulula, izibonelo, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: Qala lapha

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Qala ukufunda

entries.source: Start learning with inspir
entries.value: Qala ukufunda nge-inspir

entries.source: Start mode
entries.value: Qala imodi

entries.source: Start the first mode
entries.value: Qala imodi yokuqala

entries.source: Start the live mode at Art Appreciation Guide. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Music Theory Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Qala imodi ebukhoma ku-Art Appreciation Guide. Uma ufuna ifomethi yokufunda eseduze, zama i-Music Theory Coach. Ukuze ubone inkundla kabanzi, funda ukuthi umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kufanele enzele wonke umuntu ini.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: Qala le ndlela

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: Qala ngokuthi "{value1}", bese ungeza lokho osuvele ukwazi nalapho ubambeke khona.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: Qala ngencazelo ecacile

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: Qala ngombhalo wokuqala noma uhlaka, cela okubalulekile okukodwa, ubuyekeze wena uqobo, bese usebenzisa ukukhuluma noma ukugxeka umthombo ukuhlola ukuthi umqondo ucacile futhi uyavikeleka yini.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: Qala ngeqoqo eliyinsika elihambisana nomsebenzi wakho wokufunda, funda umhlahlandlela owodwa, bese uvula imodi yokufunda yomphakathi exhunywe ukuze uguqule iseluleko sibe ukuzijwayeza.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: Qala nge-quiz emfushane yokuxilonga noma uhlu lokuzethemba ngezihloko, bese wakhe uhlelo ezindaweni ezidala ukungaqiniseki okuningi.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: Qala ngencazelo elula, hlola umqondo ngemibuzo, bese uguqula izindawo ezibuthakathaka zibe ukukhumbula okusebenzayo.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Qala ngencazelo elula, bese ubuza imibuzo ye-Socratic uze ukwazi ukuyichaza futhi.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Qala ngenhloso ethile efana nokuthi "{value1}". Imodi isebenza kahle kakhulu lapho ufaka lokho osuvele ukwazi, lapho ubambeke khona, nohlobo losizo olufunayo.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Qala ngesihloko, umsebenzi, uhlaka, ukuhlolwa, noma umbono kumodi efanele umsebenzi.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Qala ngezibonelo zemiyalo

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Qala ngemiyalo eyisibonelo.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Qala ngo-Funda Noma Yini

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Qala nge-Learn Anything ukuze uthole incazelo elula, i-Homework Coach ngomsebenzi obambekile, noma i-Flashcard Builder uma inhloso ukubuyekeza.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Qala nge-Learn Anything uma unesihloko engqondweni. Zama i-Socratic Instruction uma ufuna imibuzo esikhundleni sencazelo. Sebenzisa i-Flashcard Builder uma udinga ukukhumbula, noma i-Exam Prep Planner uma inkinga ukuhlela isikhathi sakho sokutadisha.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: Qala nge-Learn Anything lapho udinga ukuqondiswa nencazelo elula.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: Qala nge-Math Step Coach kuma-equation noma izixazululo ezisebenzile, i-Homework Coach emisebenzini, ne-Flashcard Builder lapho udinga ukukhumbula amafomula noma amaphethini amaphutha.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Qala ngesicelo esisodwa esicacile

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: Qala ngomhlahlandlela owodwa osebenzayo, bese uvula imodi yokufunda yomphakathi ehlobene ukuze iseluleko sibe ukuzijwayeza. Lesi sigaba sakhelwe {value1}

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Qala ngendawo, isikhathi, ubuwena, imikhawulo, namalebula obufakazi ukuze isigcawu singabi ukudlala indima okuvamile.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: Qala ngemiyalo egcina ukufunda kusebenzayo.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi yesivakashi yomphakathi, bese ulolonga inguqulo yesikole ngezidingo zangempela.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Qala ngokuqondiswa komphakathi, bese uvula imodi efanele.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Qala nge-Talk to a Historical Person ngengxoxo eholwa umuntu. Sebenzisa i-Time Travel ngohambo lwendawo nesikhathi. Funda umhlahlandlela we-Talk to a Historical Person noma imiyalo ye-Time Travel nomjikelezo wokufunda uma ufuna ukugeleza komsebenzi okuhlelekile kakhudlwana.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi yokufunda ebanzi kakhulu.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: Qala ngomhlahlandlela ohambisana kangcono nomsebenzi wokufunda ophambi kwakho.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Qala ngomsebenzi odinga ukuwenziwa.

entries.source: Start with the live mode if you need help now, use a prompt if you know the exact move you want, and read the guide when you want the full study loop and mistakes to avoid.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi ebukhoma uma udinga usizo manje, sebenzisa umyalo uma wazi isinyathelo osifunayo ngqo, futhi funda umhlahlandlela lapho ufuna umjikelezo ogcwele wokutadisha namaphutha okufanele uwagweme.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the learning problem.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi ehambisana nenkinga yokufunda.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Qala ngemodi ehambisana nomzuzu.

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: Qala ngomlingani wokufunda womphakathi.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Qala ngezindlela zomphakathi, bese usebenzisa ikhasi lezikole ukubuyekeza izinyathelo zokukhishwa, izimo zokusetshenziswa, nemingcele yokwethembeka.

entries.source: Started as public quizzes and student communities in 2013.
entries.value: Kwaqala njengama-quiz omphakathi nemiphakathi yabafundi ngo-2013.

entries.source: Starter prompts turn the subject page into a first action.
entries.value: Imiyalo yokuqala iguqula ikhasi lesifundo libe isenzo sokuqala.

entries.source: Starting a new subject, repairing confusion, and turning curiosity into a clear first model.
entries.value: Ukuqala isifundo esisha, ukulungisa ukudideka, nokuguqula ilukuluku libe imodeli yokuqala ecacile.

entries.value: Yisho isimangalo

entries.source: State the dilemma and identify stakeholders.
entries.value: Yisho inkinga yokuziphatha bese uhlonza ababambiqhaza.

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Yisho inhloso ngomusho owodwa.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Yisho umqondo ngokucace kakhudlwana kunasekuqaleni.

entries.source: State the reader, claim, and assignment goal before asking for feedback.
entries.value: Yisho umfundi, isimangalo, nenhloso yomsebenzi ngaphambi kokucela impendulo.

entries.source: State the stuck point
entries.value: Yisho iphuzu obambeke kulo

entries.source: Stay evidence-aware
entries.value: Hlala uqaphela ubufakazi

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Ngena engxoxweni nomuntu omlando. Buza imibuzo, phonsela inselelo imibono, futhi uzwe umhlaba ngesikhathi sabo, izindinganiso zabo, kanye nemikhawulo yabo.

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Ngena kumongo womlando, qhathanisa izimpikiswano, futhi uzijwayeze ukubona umbono kusuka ezinhlangothini ezingaphezu kweyodwa.

entries.source: Stop procrastinating on math
entries.value: Yeka ukuhlehlisa izibalo

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Story Tutor iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Guqula imiqondo ibe izindaba, abalingiswa, izingxabano, nezigcawu ezikhumbulekayo.

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Story Tutor: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Story Tutor For Learning Through Narrative
entries.value: Story Tutor Wokufunda Ngendaba

entries.source: Story Tutor prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Story Tutor nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Story, art, music, and brainstorming modes that turn creative work into a guided learning process.
entries.value: Izindlela zendaba, ubuciko, umculo, nokucabangisisa eziguqula umsebenzi wobuciko ube inqubo yokufunda eqondisiwe.

entries.value: Hlela igumbi lokufundela

entries.value: Hlela amanothi abe yizinkomba, imininingwane, nesifinyezo

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Ukuzijwayeza okuhlelekile kusiza ukwakha izisekelo ngaphambi nangemva komsebenzi wasekhaya.

entries.source: Student AI chat
entries.value: Ingxoxo ye-AI yabafundi

entries.source: Student Forum
entries.value: Inkundla Yabafundi

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Umsebenzi wasekhaya wabafundi, ukwesekwa kwabazali, ukuhlola kothisha, nokuzifundela konke kudinga indlela yokuchaza ehlukile.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Abafundi

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Abafundi nabafundi abazifundisayo abadinga ukuhleleka ngaphandle kokwenza uhlelo lube uhlu lwezinto ezingenakwenzeka.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Abafundi badinga ukwesekwa okuqondile, othisha badinga ukuziphatha kokufunda okugxilile, abaholi badinga izindlela zokukhishwa ezinesibopho, futhi abalingani badinga izindlela ezicacile zokuxhasa ukufinyelela.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Abafundi badinga usizo olusheshayo, kodwa usizo lusadinga ukushiya ukucabanga ezandleni zabo. I-inspir ihambisa izikhathi ezivamile zokutadisha ezindleleni zomphakathi ezigxilile esikhundleni sebhokisi elilodwa lempendulo evamile.

entries.source: Students preparing essays, explanations, presentations, interviews, or oral exams.
entries.value: Abafundi abalungiselela ama-eseyi, izincazelo, izethulo, ama-interview, noma izivivinyo zomlomo.
